CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Ccp 998 Offer To Compromise And Stipulated Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAY R. HOUGHTON OF THE SMITH CURRIES LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-637-3194 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RON LUNSKI OF THE LUNSKI & STIMPERT LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-426-3525 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CARRIE HSIEH'S Motion To Set Aside CCP 998 Offer To Compromise And Stipulated Judgment Entered as a Result of Extrinsic Mistake is denied. Under CCP 473(b) a court may, "upon any terms as may be just, relieve a party or his or her legal representative from a judgment, dismissal, order, or other proceeding taken against him or her through his or her mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect." Here, the court finds there was no mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect in Defendant's decision to agree to Plaintiff's 998 settlement offer. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
